summary: PR #2268 decompiled and matched a large slice of mngallery.c plus smaller matches in gm_1601.c, grcorneria.c, and lbaudio_ax.c, with associated header signature updates. The bot report records 19 new matches, including 9 mngallery functions listed by the author, 4 gm_1601 functions, grCorneria_801DEC94, and 3 lbaudio_ax functions, plus a 99.19% fuzzy improvement for fn_802590C4. Evidence also shows narrow matching tactics such as PAD_STACK and scoped pragmas in mngallery/lbaudio_ax, but no review comments were present.

key_files.role: Primary decompilation target; added gallery camera/rendering, movie playback/menu handling, animation/update routines, includes, local static storage, scoped pragmas, temporary local structs, and PAD_STACK uses.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text.md: author lists 9 new mngallery.c matches and fn_802590C4 at about 95% fuzzy
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report lists mngallery new matches and fn_802590C4 99.19% improvement
raw_diff: mngallery.c adds includes, mnGallery_804D6C88, mnGallery_8025896C, mnGallery_80258A08, mnGallery_80258BC4, mnGallery_80258DBC, fn_80258ED0, fn_802590C4 excerpt

key_files.role: Header surface changed for mngallery; exact signature edits are not visible in loaded diff excerpt.
Added matched implementations for time/stat formatting and stage unlock check helpers.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text.md: author lists gm_801636D8, gm_80163838, gm_80163A3C, gm_80164430
raw_diff: implementations for gm_801636D8, gm_80163838, gm_80163A3C, gm_80164430

key_files.role: Updated prototypes from generic int/void* forms to typed u8/u8* and bool forms for recovered functions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gm_801636D8, gm_80163838, gm_80163A3C prototype changes

key_files.role: Added grCorneria_801DEC94, a Vec3 position test against blast zone offsets.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCorneria_801DEC94 implementation uses pos->x/y/z and Stage_GetBlastZone*Offset

key_files.role: Replaced unknown grCorneria_801DEC94 declaration with s32 grCorneria_801DEC94(Vec3*).
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grCorneria_801DEC94 prototype changed from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to s32(Vec3*)

key_files.role: Cleaned and completed several audio helper matches, including structured control flow in lbAudioAx_800263E8, PAD_STACK in lbAudioAx_80026510, and array indexing/void return in lbAudioAx_80026F2C.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text.md: author lists lbAudioAx_800263E8, lbAudioAx_80026510, lbAudioAx_80026F2C
raw_diff: lbAudioAx_800263E8 removes goto labels, lbAudioAx_80026510 adds PAD_STACK(8), lbAudioAx_80026F2C changes return and array access

key_files.role: Updated lbAudioAx_80026F2C prototype from u64 return to void.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbAudioAx_80026F2C prototype changed from u64 to void

what_changed: Added implementations replacing placeholder comments for gm_801636D8, gm_80163838, gm_80163A3C, gm_80164430, grCorneria_801DEC94, and multiple mngallery routines visible in the diff.

Updated header prototypes when recovered bodies established more specific signatures, including gm_1601.h u8/u8*/bool prototypes, grcorneria.h Vec3* signature, and lbaudio_ax.h void return for lbAudioAx_80026F2C.
Refactored lbAudioAx_800263E8 from goto-labelled generated-looking flow into nested checks with direct NULL return handling.
Changed lbAudioAx_80026F2C from returning a mask and using a moving pointer to void and direct lbl_804337C4[i] assignment.
Bot report records matched code improvement of +6052 bytes and 19 new matches, with mngallery .sdata/.sbss also newly matched and grcorneria .sdata2 showing a small unmatched data regression.
fn_802590C4 was included as an in-progress mngallery improvement rather than a claimed full match; author described it as difficult and bot report shows 99.19%, not 100%.

smart_moves.text: The PR paired recovered function bodies with header prototype updates instead of leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS or generic void* declarations where the body established argument and return types.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gm_1601.h, grcorneria.h, lbaudio_ax.h prototype changes

smart_moves.text: For repeated time formatting in gm_801636D8/gm_80163A3C and aggregate time formatting in gm_80163838, the implementation uses typed u8 outputs with NULL-guarded stores and a natural for-loop for the 0x19 entry aggregation.
The lbaudio_ax cleanup removed explicit goto labels from lbAudioAx_800263E8 and expressed success/failure with nested checks and direct returns.

The author explicitly called out fn_802590C4 as incomplete/fuzzy rather than presenting it as fully matched, which aligns with the bot report showing an unmatched-item improvement rather than a new match.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text.md: fn_802590C4 at like 95% fuzzy match

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered function body proves the signature, update the owning header in the same PR rather than leaving generic declarations.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbaudio_ax.h lbAudioAx_80026F2C return type changed

decomp_lessons.lesson: Generated-looking goto exits can sometimes be replaced by structured conditional control flow while preserving a match, as shown by lbAudioAx_800263E8 reaching 100% after replacing return_null/return_gobj labels with nested checks and direct returns.
Keep incomplete fuzzy matches clearly labeled as such; a near-match can still be useful PR evidence without being treated as a completed symbol.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text.md: fn_802590C4 described as about 95% fuzzy and difficult
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report lists fn_802590C4 under improvements in unmatched items

naming_conventions.text: Address-style function names were retained for unrecovered semantics, e.g. gm_801636D8, fn_80258ED0, fn_802590C4, lbAudioAx_80026F2C, while clearer local names such as total_frames, frames, stage_idx, unlock_bit, cobj, viewport, scissor, eye, and interest were used where roles were locally evident.
Temporary register-style names remained in some spots such as temp_r0 and temp_r31 where the PR evidence does not show a semantic rename.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Scoped MWCC pragmas were used around difficult mngallery functions, including opt_propagation off for mnGallery_80258A08 and optimization/strength-reduction/propagation settings for fn_802590C4.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: #pragma push/#pragma opt_propagation off around mnGallery_80258A08
raw_diff: #pragma optimization_level 2, opt_strength_reduction on, opt_propagation off around fn_802590C4
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_note: Loaded evidence shows these pragmas but does not include adjacent-function validation beyond the bot progress report.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK was used narrowly in mnGallery_8025896C, mnGallery_80258DBC, mnGallery_802591BC, and lbAudioAx_80026510 to affect stack layout for matching.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_note: The bot report supports match outcomes for listed symbols, but the loaded slice does not show a rationale for each PAD_STACK or a cleanup plan.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: A volatile local field was used in fn_80258ED0's temporary inner struct for gobj8, likely as a codegen steering detail; the loaded evidence only proves its presence, not the author’s exact intent.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_GObj* volatile gobj8 in fn_80258ED0_inner
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_note: Do not generalize this as a standard tactic without objdiff rationale from a fuller review.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Direct array indexing replaced pointer-walk writes in lbAudioAx_80026F2C while preserving/improving the match to 100%.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_note: This is a local cleanup observation, not proof that indexed form is always better for similar loops.

No review comments were present in the loaded PR slice; only issue comments and the bot report are available.

The diff shows small grcorneria .sdata2 regression in the bot report, but the slice does not explain whether it was accepted knowingly or incidental.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Header prototypes should follow recovered function bodies
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2268 shows recovered bodies accompanied by header updates from generic or unknown declarations to typed signatures, e.g. gm_1601.h, grcorneria.h, and lbaudio_ax.h.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbaudio_ax.h lbAudioAx_80026F2C u64 to void

accepted_candidate_records.title: Treat fuzzy near-matches as incomplete even when useful
accepted_candidate_records.text: fn_802590C4 was explicitly called out by the author as a difficult fuzzy match and the bot report lists it as an unmatched-item improvement, not a completed match.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: fn_802590C4 99.19% under improvements in unmatched items

source_update_candidates.title: Record narrow use of scoped pragmas/PAD_STACK as PR-local tactics requiring verifier context
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2268 contains scoped pragmas and PAD_STACK uses around mngallery and lbaudio_ax matching work. The bot report supports match progress, but the loaded slice does not document a per-tactic rationale or adjacent-function validation. This may be useful as an example under existing matching-tactics/pragma standards, not as a new blanket permission.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: PAD_STACK in mngallery and lbAudioAx_80026510
raw_diff: #pragma opt_propagation off and optimization pragmas in mngallery
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report new matches and fn_802590C4 improvement
source_update_candidates.reason: Curator may want this PR indexed as a cautionary example for existing standards matching-tactics-need-evidence and avoid-pragmas-register-asm.

rejection_notes: Do not promote ribbanya's MWCC link as evidence about Melee's exact compiler; the comment explicitly says it is not Melee's version but close.
Do not treat fn_802590C4 as a completed match; both author text and bot report identify it as incomplete/fuzzy.
Do not infer reviewer approval of PAD_STACK, volatile locals, or pragmas from merge status alone; no review comments are present in the loaded slice.
Do not claim exact mngallery.h signature changes from loaded evidence; only changed-file metadata is visible for that header.
